items.title: Tesla claims boost Giga Berlin production 20%, but numbers don’t add up
items.body: Tesla lists Giga Berlin’s Model Y production capacity at more than 375,000 units per year — roughly 93,000 per quarter. The plant manager just celebrated a “record” Q1 2026 of 61,000 units and announced a 20% production …
